page: Microsoft Azure E128-32s_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Esv6 family. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is configured with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 32.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage, though the hardware is Premium Storage capable. There are zero integrated GPUs, and the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The E128-32s_v6 represents a constrained-core configuration, where a larger instance size is limited to 32 active vCPUs. This design provides high memory density and memory bandwidth per active core, optimizing software licensing costs that are billed per vCPU while maintaining access to a 1 TB memory footprint. The primary tradeoff is the complete reliance on network-attached storage and the lack of local NVMe drives.

Due to the high memory-to-core ratio, this server is designed for memory-intensive workloads. Suitable applications include large relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise resource planning installations that require substantial RAM but do not scale linearly with high vCPU counts.
description: Microsoft Azure E128-32s_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the Esv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a high resource density of 32.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs but is Premium Storage capable for external block storage needs. This constrained-core configuration is designed to optimize database licensing costs by offering a massive memory footprint relative to the active vCPU count. It is suited for memory-intensive workloads such as large relational databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-32s_v6 is a memory-optimized Esv6-family instance with 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and no local storage, designed for memory-intensive database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128-32s_v6 is a memory-optimized Esv6 instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A memory-optimized, constrained-core x86_64 instance featuring a one-terabyte memory footprint and thirty-two dedicated vCPUs for database workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs on x86_64 Intel architecture
1024.0 GB of system memory providing 32.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Constrained-core configuration to optimize software licensing costs
Designed for large relational databases and in-memory applications
